# TARP: The Arena Revival Project

> A living knowledge base for competitive Arena FPS.
> Covers mechanics, movement, weapons, gametypes, and modding for Warfork, Quake Live, and Reflex Arena.
> All pages are verified against source material before publication.

Site: https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki

## Overview

- [The Arena Revival Project](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/): A living knowledge base for Arena FPS: Warfork, Quake Live, and Reflex Arena.

## Warfork

- [Warfork](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/): Mechanics, movement, weapons, maps, and competitive knowledge for Warfork.

### Warfork: Weapons

- [Weapons](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/)
- [Electrobolt](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/electrobolt)
- [Grenade Launcher](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/grenade-launcher)
- [Gunblade](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/gunblade)
- [Instagun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/instagun)
- [Lasergun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/lasergun)
- [Machinegun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/machinegun)
- [Plasmagun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/plasmagun)
- [Riotgun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/riotgun)
- [Rocket Launcher](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/weapons/rocket-launcher)

### Warfork: Gametypes

- [Gametypes](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/)
- [Bomb and Defuse](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/bomb-and-defuse)
- [Capture the Flag](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/capture-the-flag)
- [Clan Arena](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/clan-arena)
- [Deathmatch](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/deathmatch)
- [Duel](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/duel)
- [Headhunt](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/headhunt)
- [Instagib](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/instagib)
- [Race](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/race)
- [Team Deathmatch](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/gametypes/team-deathmatch)

### Warfork: Modding

- [Modding](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/modding/)
- [Custom Gametypes](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/modding/custom-gametypes)
- [Custom HUDs](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/modding/custom-huds)
- [Custom Shaders](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/modding/custom-shaders)
- [Gametype Scripting Reference](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/modding/gametype-scripting-reference)
- [Server Hosting](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/modding/server-hosting)

### Warfork: General

- [Console Commands](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/console)
- [Controls](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/controls)

- [Health and Armor](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/health-and-armor)
- [Movement](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/movement)
- [Powerups](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/warfork/powerups)

## Quake Live

- [Quake Live](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/): Mechanics, movement, weapons, maps, and competitive knowledge for Quake Live.

### Quake Live: Weapons

- [Weapons](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/)
- [Gauntlet](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/gauntlet)
- [Grenade Launcher](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/grenade-launcher)
- [Lightning Gun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/lightning-gun)
- [Machine Gun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/machine-gun)
- [Plasma Gun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/plasma-gun)
- [Railgun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/railgun)
- [Rocket Launcher](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/rocket-launcher)
- [Shotgun](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/weapons/shotgun)

### Quake Live: Gametypes

- [Gametypes](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/gametypes/)
- [Clan Arena](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/gametypes/clan-arena)
- [Capture the Flag](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/gametypes/ctf)
- [Duel](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/gametypes/duel)
- [Free For All](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/gametypes/ffa)
- [Team Deathmatch](https://tonikwithak.github.io/tarp-wiki/games/quake-live/gametypes/tdm)
